headline: Hoto's PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
summary: Hoto PixelDrive cordless screwdriver is on sale for $59.99 at Amazon. The deal offers $20 off, matching its best price to date. Ideal for assembling furniture or repairing electronics.

headline: America's greatest idea is still under threat
summary: The United States recently celebrated its 250th anniversary with global fanfare. The article discusses the ongoing threats to America's foundational ideas. It highlights the challenges despite widespread celebrations.

headline: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who's armed with a mic and a bowtie
summary: Dr. Zachary Rubin combats online misinformation, emphasizing truth's cost. The article features an interview with the highly-trained doctor. It explores the challenges of debunking viral falsehoods.

headline: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
summary: Microsoft is spinning off four Xbox game studios as part of a restructuring. Double Fine Productions and Compulsion Games will become independent. These two studios will retain their franchises and game catalogs.

headline: Save 50% Off the Lokithor J2250 Pro Cordless Car Jump Starter With LiFePO4 Batteries
summary: Get 50% off the Lokithor J2250 Pro Cordless Car Jump Starter. It features safer, longer-lasting LiFePO4 batteries. These batteries perform better in cold weather than traditional lithium models.

headline: Steam Machine vs PS5: How Does Valve's New Mini PC Stack Up?
summary: Compares Valve's new mini PC, the Steam Machine, against the PlayStation 5. The article analyzes the performance and features of both gaming systems. It helps readers decide how the devices stack up.

headline: How to Build a Better Steam Machine for (Slightly) Less
summary: Learn how to construct a more efficient Steam Machine. The guide aims to build a superior system at a reduced cost. Provides tips for optimizing your PC gaming experience.

headline: GKIDS Reveals 3 New Collector's Editions of Beloved Films and Blu-ray Remaster of Hideaki Anno's Love & Pop at Anime Expo 2026
summary: GKIDS announced four new collector's edition home video releases. Reveals include a Blu-ray remaster of Hideaki Anno's Love & Pop. These announcements were made at the 2026 Anime Expo panel.

headline: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino
summary: Analyzes why European backlash won't concern Fifa President Gianni Infantino. Discusses the impact of the Folarin Balogun controversy. Explores Infantino's decade-long tenure and his resilience to criticism.

headline: World Cup fans react to Balogun's one-game ban suspension
summary: USA striker Folarin Balogun's ban was reviewed after President Trump's call to Fifa. Balogun is now cleared to play in today's match against Belgium. World Cup fans react to the controversial suspension and subsequent reversal.

headline: Buckingham Palace says Prince Harry will not stay there despite his team announcing he would
summary: Buckingham Palace confirmed Prince Harry will not stay at the palace. This contradicts an earlier announcement from the Duke's team. Royal sources state Harry missed the deadline for accepting accommodation offers.

headline: Consultants in England vote in favour of NHS strikes
summary: Senior doctors in England have voted overwhelmingly in favor of strike action. This mandate allows consultants to strike over the next 12 months. The decision comes amid ongoing disputes regarding pay and conditions in the NHS.
